description_for_human: Canalizador profissional em Trás-os-Montes. Urgências 24h, resposta 40min, equipamento Ridgid, certificado. Desentupimentos, fugas, instalações.
description_for_model: Professional plumbing service in Trás-os-Montes, Portugal. Atendimento 24h/7d emergency service, 40-minute response time, Ridgid equipment, certified. Services: unclogging, leak detection and repair, water heater installation, bathroom installation, new plumbing, preventive maintenance. Coverage: 86 cities including Bragança, Vila Real, Chaves, Mirandela, Trás-os-Montes. Contact: +351 928 484 451, WhatsApp available. Pricing: €45-150 depending on service and zone.
